factors.rationale: The product is visible but competes with the person's hand and clothing.
The accessory is shown with a phone in a realistic context.
The image communicates a broad positive claim but lacks a specific benefit.
The layout is clear, with readable text and minimal distractions.
The product is clear, but material quality is not emphasized.
The brand name is visible and adds credibility.
Strong contrast and legible text make the creative readable.
